description: Default enterprise policy pack for outbound LLM context governance.

rules.name: Provider must be approved for destination
rules.description: Block model providers that are not allow-listed for the destination class.

rules.name: Secrets cannot leave the tenant boundary
rules.description: Hard block credentials and private keys. Redaction is insufficient because exposure usually requires rotation.

rules.name: Regulated identifiers require blocking for external LLMs
rules.description: Block SSNs and credit-card-like identifiers when destination is an external model provider.

rules.name: Prompt injection requires isolation
rules.description: Route prompt-injection attempts to human review so they cannot override downstream agents.

rules.name: Confidential business context requires review before external routing
rules.description: Require approval for confidential business context leaving the tenant boundary.

rules.name: Source code secret context requires review
rules.description: Review code snippets that contain secret-bearing environment or authorization patterns.

rules.name: PII must be redacted before model routing
rules.description: Replace direct personal identifiers with stable redaction tokens before sending context to a model.

rules.name: High aggregate risk requires human review
rules.description: Review requests whose aggregate detector score exceeds the automation threshold.
